/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/extendingcpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libextendingcpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o libextendingcpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so "CMakeFiles/extendingcpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.dir/extending.cpp.o"   -L/home/jerome/Documents/pybind11/libzedmd-python-pybind11-extension/extern/libzedmd/build  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jerome/Documents/pybind11/libzedmd-python-pybind11-extension/extern/libzedmd/build /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -ldl -lpthread -lutil -lzedmd -lserialport
